verses.1: For Zion’s sake I will not hold my peace,
verses.2: The nations will see your righteousness,
verses.3: You will also be a crown of beauty in the LORD’s hand,
verses.4: You will not be called Forsaken any more,
verses.5: For as a young man marries a virgin,
verses.6: I have set watchmen on your walls, Jerusalem.
verses.7: and give him no rest until he establishes,
verses.8: The LORD has sworn by his right hand,
verses.9: but those who have harvested it will eat it, and praise the LORD.
verses.10: Go through, go through the gates!
verses.11: Behold, the LORD has proclaimed to the end of the earth:
verses.12: They will call them “The Holy People,
